title: Integration Test Configuration
description: Shape parsed off MJTestEntity.Configuration for the 'Integration Test' TestType (DriverClass IntegrationTestDriver). Authored as a package asset (NOT under metadata/test-types/schemas/, which an mj-sync glob owns).

checks.description: Ordered list of integration checks to run in ONE Execute() against one bootstrapped context. Order is significant (stateful pairs like S1→S2 depend on it).

type.description: Registry key resolved at runtime via IntegrationCheckRegistry.Get(id), e.g. 'server-cache.S1'.

config.description: Optional per-check knobs (reserved for later phases).

requiresEnv.description: Env var that must equal '1' for the test to run; otherwise the run is skip-passed with a gate note.

transport.description: 'server' = SQLServerDataProvider only; 'client' = also needs a running MJAPI + MJ_API_KEY (deferred past Phase 1).
